sections.paragraph:
σύνδεσμος, ου, ὁ [σύν, δεσμός] ‘that which holds someth. together’

—a. as anatomical part ligament Col 2:19; in imagery uniting bond Eph 4:3; Col 3:14.

—b. in imagery of a penal bond fetter Ac 8:23; here some interpret the imagery as that of someth. held together in the shape of a bundle.
